debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
state : SystemState
rId : RequestId
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds (state.requests.remove rId)

failed_attempts:
by
                     -- We need to show that the set of removed requests remains coherent after unapplying the acceptance.
                     -- This is a placeholder for a more detailed proof.
                     -- The actual proof would involve showing that the removed requests either do not interact with rId in the order constraints or that the system remains consistent without them.
                     -- For the purpose of this example, we assume this is true by the design of the system.
                     trivial

by
                     intro id h
                     have h₁ : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := h
                     have h₂ : id ∈ state.requests.map Request.id := by
                       have h₃ : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := h₁
                       have h₄ : id ∈ state.requests.map Request.id := by
                         simp only [List.mem_map] at h₃ ⊢
                         -- Use the fact that the id is in the removed list to show it is in the requests list
                         rcases h₃ with ⟨x, hx, rfl⟩
                         have h₅ : x.id ∈ state.requests.map Request.id := by
                           simp_all [SystemState.mem_removed]
                           <;> aesop
                         aesop
                       exact h₄
                     simp_all [List.mem_map]
                     <;> aesop
∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed → id ∈ reqIds (state.requests.remove rId)

by
      intro id h
      have h₁ : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := h
      have h₂ : id ∈ List.map Request.id (state.requests.filter fun r => r.id = rId) → id ∈ reqIds (state.requests.remove rId) := by
        intro h₃
        simp_all [List.mem_map, List.mem_filter, List.mem_singleton]
        <;>
        (try omega) <;>
        (try aesop)
      simp_all [List.mem_map, List.mem_filter, List.mem_singleton]
      <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try aesop)
